ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region (e.g., North America, Europe) */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Geographic subregion (e.g., Western Europe, Southern Asia) */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO 4217 currency code for the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Primary official language of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (population per square kilometer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita in USD */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate in percentage */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in percentage */,
  "trade_percentage_gdp" REAL /* Trade as a percentage of GDP */,
  "gdp" TEXT /* Total GDP in USD */,
  "gini_index" REAL /* Gini index to measure income inequality */,
  "human_development_index" REAL /* Human Development Index (HDI) */,
  "fiscal_deficit" REAL /* Fiscal deficit as a percentage of GDP */,
  "debt_to_gdp_ratio" REAL /* Total debt as a percentage of GDP */,
  "foreign_direct_investment" REAL /* Foreign direct investment as a percentage of GDP */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in percentage */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate in percentage */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy in years */,
  "internet_usage" REAL /* Internet usage as a percentage of the population */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source's website */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the data provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the data provider */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the data provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference to a methodological document or standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "before_value" TEXT /* Value of the data before the change */,
  "after_value" TEXT /* Value of the data after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_history_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the economic indicator */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to verify the integrity of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to verify the integrity of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data upload event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being uploaded */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the data */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file */,
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the readme file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the upload (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_readme_id FOREIGN KEY ("readme_id") REFERENCES readme_files ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being validated */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the validation rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "validation_result" INTEGER /* Result of the validation (true or false) */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Detailed error message if the validation fails */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)
